subject: [CPS] OOM changes for NCMP-DMI-PLUGIN
commit_message:
[CPS] OOM changes for NCMP-DMI-PLUGIN

- Updated ncmp-dmi-plugin image version from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0

Issue-ID: CPS-1281
Change-Id: I4f24b5a15c8da9270633281ffd29286cc059c765
Signed-off-by: mpriyank <priyank.maheshwari@est.tech>
